cn_title: 《神鬼寓言》重启版跳票至2027年2月
opus_summary: Xbox宣布《神鬼寓言》重启版从2026年秋季延期至2027年2月，以避开拥挤档期和《GTA 6》。官方称希望给予作品专属时刻，6月7日Showcase将带来新展示。

paragraphs.en: Xbox has announced a delay to its upcoming Fable reboot, which will now launch in February 2027.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox宣布旗下即将推出的《神鬼寓言》重启版延期，现定于2027年2月发售。

paragraphs.en: The long-awaited RPG had been due to launch this fall on PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S, though Microsoft had not set a specific date for its arrival. Now, due to Xbox's busy release schedule (and a certain game named GTA 6), it's coming next year instead.
paragraphs.cn: 这款期待已久的RPG原定于今年秋季登陆PC、PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X/S，尽管微软一直没有给出具体发售日期。现在，由于Xbox今年的发售计划过于拥挤（以及某款叫《GTA 6》的游戏），它被推迟到了明年。

paragraphs.en: "This year is packed with incredible games for Xbox players to enjoy, from Halo: Campaign Evolved, Gears of War: E-Day and Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4 to Control Resonant, Star Wars: Galactic Racer and Grand Theft Auto VI," Xbox wrote in a post on social media.
paragraphs.cn: 「今年有大量精彩游戏供Xbox玩家享受，从《光环：战役进化》《战争机器：事变日》《使命召唤：现代战争4》到《控制：共振》《星球大战：银河赛车》和《GTA 6》，」Xbox在社交媒体上写道。

paragraphs.en: "In order to plan our game launches through the holidays, in a way that works best for players, we're moving Fable to February 2027 so it can have the dedicated moment it deserves. We're excited to be giving players a major new look at Fable, as well as our broader lineup, at Xbox Games Showcase on June 7."
paragraphs.cn: 「为了以对玩家最有利的方式规划假期游戏发售，我们将《神鬼寓言》推迟至2027年2月，让它获得应有的专属时刻。我们很高兴将在6月7日的Xbox Games Showcase上为玩家带来《神鬼寓言》的全新展示，以及更多游戏阵容。」

paragraphs.en: The news follows speculation last month that Microsoft had delayed Fable internally — something that the official Fable social media account stepped in to deny, pointing instead to its previously announced fall launch window.
paragraphs.cn: 此消息印证了上个月的传闻——微软在内部已经将《神鬼寓言》延期。当时官方社交账号出面否认，并重申了此前公布的秋季发售窗口。

paragraphs.en: Giant Bomb's Jeff Grubb reported last month that there had been concern at Microsoft about Fable potentially running up against the behemoth that is GTA 6, which now appears to be locked in to its November 19, 2026 release date.
paragraphs.cn: Giant Bomb的Jeff Grubb上月报道称，微软内部曾担心《神鬼寓言》可能撞上《GTA 6》这个巨无霸——后者目前看来已锁定2026年11月19日发售。

paragraphs.en: "I'll say that I've heard that Fable has been pushed internally," Grubb said. "That doesn't mean that it's coming out next year. Apparently, they're still trying to get it out this year, but they are worried about the launch of Grand Theft Auto 6. And so if it's getting delayed beyond the release of Grand Theft Auto 6, that could push it into December, which might make it a prime candidate to get delayed into 2027."
paragraphs.cn: 「我得说，我听到的消息是《神鬼寓言》在内部已经被推迟了，」Grubb说，「这并不意味着它一定会到明年。显然他们仍在努力让它今年发售，但他们担心《GTA 6》的发售。如果延期到《GTA 6》发售之后，那可能就要推到12月，而这又使它极有可能被推迟到2027年。」

paragraphs.en: Microsoft still has many other release dates to solidify, such as for Halo: Campaign Evolved and Gears of War: E-Day. Fans will undoubtedly get a clearer idea of Microsoft's release plans during its Xbox Games Showcase.
paragraphs.cn: 微软还有许多其他发售日期待确定，比如《光环：战役进化》和《战争机器：事变日》。粉丝们无疑将在Xbox Games Showcase上获得更清晰的发售计划。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, the Microsoft-owned Activision announced Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, which will launch on October 23.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，微软旗下的动视宣布了《使命召唤：现代战争4》，将于10月23日发售。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this year, IGN spoke with Fable developer Playground Games about its bid to bring back the beloved British role-playing series, and we learned that not only are there 1,000 fully voiced NPCs, but you can marry every single one of them.
paragraphs.cn: 今年早些时候，IGN与《神鬼寓言》开发商Playground Games进行了对话，了解到这款游戏不仅拥有1000个全配音NPC，而且你可以和他们中的每一个结婚。

subtitle: 避其锋芒
